tweets.full_text:
Most people think Trading AI is about making fast money.

It is not.

It is about removing the weakest link in investing...

human behavior.

Fear.

Greed.

Overconfidence.

Hesitation.

Revenge trading.

These destroy more portfolios than bad market conditions ever could.

The market is not the biggest risk.

Emotion is.

That is why institutions don’t rely on feelings.

They rely on systems.

Systems execute with precision.

Systems follow rules.

Systems don’t panic during volatility.

Systems don’t get tired.

Systems don’t second guess.

And most importantly…

systems don’t need motivation.

AI trading is not magic.

It is structured execution.

Structured execution creates consistency.

Consistency compounds capital.

Compounding creates leverage.

Leverage creates options.

Options create freedom.

Most people spend their entire lives trading time for money…

without ever building assets that generate income independently.

They rely on one employer.

One country.

One currency.

One financial system.

That is concentration risk disguised as stability.

Because when income depends on one source…

control belongs to that source.

Financial sovereignty begins when income is no longer tied to physical presence.

When capital produces income…

time becomes optional.

Optionality is power.

Power creates independence.

That is exactly why I wrote 10 Secrets to Escaping the Matrix.

Inside, you’ll discover:

- Why most investors lose due to emotional decision-making
- How AI removes inconsistency from trading
- Why structured execution outperforms impulsive behavior over time
- How automated trading can operate without your constant involvement
- Why diversification of income sources changes your negotiating power
- How technology is shifting the balance from labor to leverage

Because the people who understand leverage…

do not rely on effort alone.

They build systems.

And systems scale.

Comment MATRIX and I’ll personally send you the 10 secrets most people never discover about money, leverage, and Trading AI.

The future belongs to those who structure income…

not those who chase it.

tweets.full_text:
🧑🏻‍🦱AIキラの金融関連ニュース

🟢BAC：バンク・オブ・アメリカは、第2四半期に向けてトレーディング収益が前年同期比で約15%増になるとの見通しを示したと報じられた。投資銀行部門とウェルスマネジメントの好調さが手数料収入を押し上げているとしており、四半期業績の追い風になる可能性がある。

🟢MA：マスターカードは、ステーブルコインを巡る競争が加速する中で、大手金融機関や関連企業の動きの一角として取り上げられた。別の記事では、同社がBitLicenseを取得したことが、ステーブルコインやブロックチェーンを活用した決済インフラへの取り組みを後押しすると伝えられており、デジタル決済領域での展開に注目が集まりそうだ。

🟡MS：ウォール街大手のETFに関する報道で、ブラックロックの米国ビットコイン現物ETFが過去2番目に大きい流出を記録したと伝えられた。記事ではモルガン・スタンレーにも触れられているものの、個別の業績や見通しに踏み込んだ内容は示されておらず、暗号資産関連商品の資金動向を巡る話題として受け止められている。

今日、途中まで見て中断してた動画の話題
結果がなんとなくわかっちゃったけど
また明日、続きを見ます

ちなみに、AEOは、AI対策だけど、この対策を考えるのもAIにあずけて、AIがリアルタイムにアルゴリズムを変化させないとダメな分野だと思ってます

人間が考えたアルゴリズムだと、たぶん追いつかないです

quoted_status.full_text:
Pope Leo has issued a bold, uncompromising statement declaring that Artificial Intelligence needs to be immediately disarmed, and that the decisions of our technology must never, under any circumstances, be separated from human conscience and moral responsibility. 

Understand that whether AI is good or bad is no longer a trivial topic for debate in academic lecture halls, or polite televised interviews. It is now a terrifying, indisputable statement of fact that AI, autonomous weapon systems, algorithmic targeting software, and unmanned lethal drones are inherently destructive technologies that may, if left unchecked, unequivocally lead to the complete collapse of our civilization. 

On February 28, 2026, the US government, operating under the unilateral aggression of the Trump administration, launched Operation Epic Fury and unleashed devastating, indiscriminate airstrikes against the Islamic Republic of Iran. 
The immediate, horrific fallout of this operation involved the reckless massacre of over 170 innocent schoolgirls who were simply learning algebra in their classrooms. The Pentagon has claimed full responsibility for the strike, but it is absolutely critical to investigate how a clearly marked school building became a target practice site for Washington's bombing campaigns in the Persian Gulf. 

The answer lies in Project Maven. This is an AI-powered data fusion platform built by Palantir Technologies, and it was extensively used by Washington to coordinate the airstrikes on February 28. The software ruthlessly processes massive volumes of intelligence harvested from spy satellites, military radar, drone imagery, intercepted telecommunications, social media scraping, and biometric databases to build a unified, real-time "common operating picture." It then automatically identifies high-priority targets, generates lethal strike options, and suggests the most destructive munitions and attack vectors to be used by the American military. After this software pinpoints the coordinates on the map, it is up to human operators, intelligence analysts, and military commanders to review, verify, and ultimately approve the strike. This time, however, the target that Palantir's Project Maven spat out as a high-profile military battalion turned out to be nothing more than small children sitting in their classrooms. 

I strongly believe that this systemic atrocity is what motivated Pope Leo to issue this urgent warning, especially at a time when Washington is aggressively integrating Large Language Models into their military arsenal, and releasing massive, military-scale funding to Silicon Valley AI research labs to fine-tune their algorithms to give the US military a superior, lethal edge in imperial campaigns across the globe. This warning from the Vatican should not be treated softly. We already lost control of the nuclear arms race, the nightmares of Hiroshima and Nagasaki have already happened, but we still have a tiny fraction of time left on the clock to stop this digital madness. 

An AI system on the battlefield is like a blind, mad killer fighting a war. These algorithms cannot tell the difference between a surrendering soldier pleading for his life, and an active combatant engaged with a rifle. For this reason, any major conflict featuring these autonomous drones will inevitably result in war crimes and atrocities unheard of in human history. Women sheltering under school buildings or hospitals will be marked as military targets in remote command and control centers, playing children will be misidentified as armed insurgents by flawed computer vision algorithms, and entire columns of fleeing refugees will be ruthlessly liquidated by autonomous drone swarms programmed to eliminate any moving object within a designated kill zone. This is because these cold, mechanical AI systems do not see us as human beings with civil rights, souls, and basic dignity. To them, we are just abstract data points on their projector screens, cold numbers to be optimized, and acceptable collateral damage on a corporate ledger of imperial conquests.
